name: Rescue the Fish
author: Poki
description: Rescue the Fish is a puzzle game where your mission is to guide a little fish safely back to the ocean! Pull the right pins to help the fish move forward while avoiding deadly hazards like fire, freezing ice, chainsaws, and other dangers. Use your wits and strategy to solve each puzzle. If you make a mistake, don't worry—just restart the level and try again! Can you successfully rescue the fish and set it free? How to play Rescue the Fish? Click and drag to pull the pin. Who created Rescue the Fish? Rescue the Fish is created by Blabbers Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Rescue the Fish for free? You can play Rescue the Fish for free on Poki. Can I play Rescue the Fish on mobile devices and desktop? Rescue the Fish can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
